chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 两轮电动车没有天花板，爱玛黑翼要用AI与硬核科技赢得年轻男性的心
chinese_news.summary: 国内两轮电动车市场正悄然迎来一场深层次的“基因突变”。长期以来，大众对两轮电动车的认知被牢牢框定在“代步工具”与“大众精品”的传统叙事里。然而，在四川省体育馆的一场发布会上，爱玛正式发布了旗下专为年轻男性打造的极速运动品类品牌——“爱玛黑翼”（AIMA BLACK WING）。首位中国F1车手周冠宇化身“全速领航员”在线助力，爱玛黑翼S360电竞版、爱玛黑翼S360赛道版以及爱玛黑翼S790赛博版三款硬核新品集结亮相。这场动作透露出的创投信号再明显不过：在女性和基础通勤赛道筑牢绝对壁垒后，传统头部巨头爱玛正以一种颠覆性的姿态，正式向年轻男性性能与运动电摩赛道发起总攻。36氪通过与爱玛科技集团三位核心高管的深度专访，试图拆解两轮电动车从功能代步全面迈向体验升级的下半场逻辑，看他们如何锚定Z世代的硬核社交货币，打破行业所谓的“天花板”。

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 纯粹热爱的城市探索玩家而来 ，爱玛黑翼三大新车集结亮相
chinese_news.summary:
6月17日，爱玛黑翼品牌战略发布会在四川省体育馆盛大开启。体育馆化身爱玛黑翼玩家街区，潮流青年齐聚现场。爱玛黑翼以“全速热爱”为品牌主张，携爱玛黑翼S360电竞版、爱玛黑翼S360赛道版、爱玛黑翼S790赛博版三款车型重磅亮相，首位中国F1车手周冠宇以爱玛黑翼“全速领航员”身份在线助力品牌发布。爱玛黑翼的登场，标志着爱玛电动车在男性出行科技领域树立起全新坐标，正式构建起“他硬核”增长格局，向“时尚科技年轻品牌”全速进阶。

chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

滴滴自动驾驶参加伦敦MOVE 2026大会

6月17至18日，MOVE 2026大会在英国伦敦召开，滴滴自动驾驶在会上分享了来自中国的自动驾驶落地实践。在AI技术方面，滴滴自动驾驶已实现L4级全栈核心技术的自主可控；硬件方面，与广汽埃安联合打造的新一代Robotaxi车型R2已于今年1月交付，正持续在广州和北京等地开展道路测试；在场景应用上，自去年四季度在广州、北京部分示范应用区域开启全天候载客测试以来，滴滴自动驾驶始终保持安全稳定的运行表现。

chinese_news.title: 蔚来补上“智驾课”，任少卿总结：智驾技术创新将重构竞争
chinese_news.summary:
文｜肖漫
编辑｜李勤

6月18日，蔚来同时向两代平台车型（包含8款NT2.0平台车型、4款NT2.5平台车型，以及6款NT3.0车型）推送了最新版的世界模型，这意味着，蔚来现在能让同一套复杂的智驾代码，现在能跑在不同代际的芯片上。

软件迭代节奏被硬件绑架曾是一个困扰行业的难题。很多车企无法在不同版本、配置的车型上迭代同一款软件，这带来的结果是，很长时间内只有使用最新版本硬件的车才能用上最好的软件，老车主被背刺。

蔚来部署推理跨平台兼容

chinese_news.title: 中国游戏的错位竞争：头部赌3A，腰部吃存量 | 游戏风向标
chinese_news.summary:
文丨小葵

编辑丨果脯

中国游戏产业正站在一个微妙的分水岭上。

一边，腾讯网易等头部大厂利用资本，以全球资源整合或漫长自研周期，向代表行业塔尖的3A单机游戏发起冲锋；另一边，以4399百奥为代表的腰部力量，在各自深耕的细分赛道里，通过成熟玩法复刻与精细化运营，稳守利润阵地。

今年夏日游戏节的发布会上，数十家全球顶尖游戏厂商轮番登台，发布了超过50款新作的最新消息。

在海外大厂普遍打出“老IP重制+续作”保守牌局中，腾讯和网易同时拿出3A级的单机产品，并肩出现在全球顶级展会的聚光灯下。

当大厂渴望用3A讲述中国故事建立全球品牌壁垒，腰部厂商则在存量市场中持续收割，一个向上押注3A，一个向下蚕食存量。这两条看似背道而驰的路，正共用着同一个起点。

01

本次SGF上，腾讯拿出《穿越火线：潜伏》与《古剑》堪称两张风格迥异的牌。

《穿越火线：潜伏》由That's No Moon工作室（核心成员来自顽皮狗、Infinity War

chinese_news.title: 12306要忙着赚钱了
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 王晗玉

编辑 | 张帆

近日，市场监管总局联合中央网信办、国家铁路局，依法约谈携程、同程、去哪儿、飞猪、美团、智行火车票、高铁管家7家旅游出行第三方平台，直指平台在火车票销售领域存在多项不规范经营行为。

具体来看，违规行为包括不当宣传“候补帮抢”及付费选座、不当诱导用户“买长乘短”“买短乘长”，不当收集、使用用户个人信息等问题。后续监管部门将加大监管执法力度。

此次集中约谈，不仅直指OTA平台火车票业务的乱象根源，也揭开了在线旅游行业围绕出行流量展开的深层博弈。

监管收紧的背景下，传统OTA依赖的流量逻辑正在动摇，而铁路官方平台跨界拓展酒旅业务的可能性，也让整个在线出行行业迎来新一轮变数。

抢票“加速包”，OTA的“流量加速包”

每逢各大、小长假，打开OTA平台的火车票页面，“极速抢票”“候补加速”“高成功率帮抢”等标语便铺天盖地，甚至

chinese_news.title: 北大科学家下场做脑机接口，种子轮融了近亿元
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 孙小雯

访谈 / 编辑 | 海若镜

「暗涌Waves」独家获悉，侵入式脑机接口公司「芯生视界」近日完成近亿元人民币种子轮融资。本轮融资由经纬创投领投，星连资本、燕缘创投、水木创投跟投。

当下，侵入式脑机接口已经在治疗瘫痪、脑控外设等医疗场景落地，验证长期植入的安全、有效。与此同时，AI Agent和具身智能技术加速进化，也放大了市场对脑机接口的期待：改写未来“人机交互”的方式，实现人机融合、增强人类。马斯克和他的Neuralink，正是这一叙事的风向标。

芯生视界团队集合了多位国家“脑计划”脑机接口方向“青年首席”：创始人王茜来自北京大学心理与认知科学学院、IDG麦戈文脑科学研究所。联合创始人李远宁来自上海科技大学，是卡耐基梅隆大学人工智能和神经科学博士，曾在加州大学旧金山分校Edward Chang实验室（脑机接口顶级实验室）从事博后研究多年。联创团队还包括来自北京大学具身智能、脑机芯片和类脑芯片等方向的专家。

chinese_news.title: 红杉、阿里押注过的具身大脑公司再融资，上交等投资数亿元｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，具身智能企业穹彻智能（Noematrix）近日完成新一轮数亿元融资，本轮融资由无锡数据集团领投，投资方包括上海交通大学AI未来基金（创业基金）、上海创之智科技有限公司（上海创智学院全资子公司）、一村资本等。 

这也是公司近半年来完成的又一轮融资。此前穹彻智能已获得多家机构加持，包括Prosperity7 Ventures、红杉中国、C Capital、阿里巴巴和Sea Limited等。

穹彻智能是硬氪长期关注的企业。公司成立于2023年11月，长期专注具身智能基础模型与系统的自主研发，已发布有核心产品“穹彻具身大脑”（Noematrix Brain），并围绕其构建了覆盖数据采集、模型训练到部署验证、具身机器人应用全流程的软硬件产品体系。

具身智能的行业叙事正在经历一次静默的转向。过去两年，赛道内备受追捧的能力是“完成一个动作”，抓取、搬运、行走等任务在实验室或演示台上被反复验证。但自今年以来，一个新的衡量尺度正在浮现：机器人能否在真实物理环境中

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin trade above $60,000 on or before June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Cointelegraph reports BTC decoupling from tech stocks with capital rotation into AI; current slide below $60K makes this a live pivot point.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph headline 'Bitcoin decouples from tech stocks: Is $60K BTC's next stop?' + CoinDesk performance tracking

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates at least once before December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's hawkish inflation rhetoric (CNBC top story) is being interpreted as signaling a harder stance than market priced; repricing odds of rate cuts.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC 'Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX stock (SPACE) close above $195 on or before July 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CNBC reports post-IPO buyers underwater after 7% slide to $178; volume-weighted average ~$180 represents a tight technical range with recovery upside.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC 'The average SpaceX buyer post-IPO is almost under water after two-day slide'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the U.S. reach a permanent (non-blockade) normalization deal with Iran by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump administration has lifted naval blockade and signed a deal; BBC/CNBC reporting divergence on whether regime has been 'empowered' or constrained signals high uncertainty.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC 'U.S. Navy ends blockade of Iran's ports' + BBC 'Iran's supreme leader says Trump made deal out of desperation'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum continue to outperform Bitcoin (ETH/BTC ratio above 0.055) through August 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Ethereum Foundation co-executive director Hsiao-Wei Wang's resignation signals governance friction; but CoinDesk AI/identity infrastructure story (Alchemy/Visa) shows layer-2 momentum.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk 'Ethereum Foundation loses another key leader' + 'Alchemy's AI-driven identity and payment service gains access to Visa network'

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Noam Shazeer's move to OpenAI result in a major AI model release (Claude competitor, or OpenAI GPT-5+) by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: OpenAI official announcements, SEC filings, major tech news outlets (CNBC, Reuters, The Verge)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Hacker News discussion of Shazeer joining OpenAI (232 score, 199 comments) suggests market is underpricing the talent acquisition as a signal of imminent major product release; historically such hires precede announcements.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Noam Shazeer's proven track record at Google Brain/DeepMind; OpenAI competing with Anthropic's Claude 3.5+ requires new model drops.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the U.S. stablecoin regulatory framework (GENIUS Act or equivalent) be enacted into law by June 30, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Congress legislative records (Congress.gov), SEC/OCC/Fed official announcements
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk and Cointelegraph both report U.S. agencies pitching stablecoin customer-ID rules akin to banks; this is a rare alignment of crypto regulation across agencies but still low visibility in prediction markets.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk 'U.S. agencies seek stablecoin customer-ID rules akin to banks in new GENIUS Act pitch' + Cointelegraph 'US regulators push user ID requirements for stablecoin issuers'

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Waymo robotaxi deployment (fleet size) exceed 10,000 vehicles in a single U.S. metropolitan area by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Waymo official deployment reports, regulatory filings, verifiable third-party ridership data (Uber/Lyft benchmarks)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reports 3,900-unit recall due to freeway construction zone errors; market is fixating on setback, but recall = evidence of scale and rapid iteration (not failure to scale).
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Waymo recall of 3,900 robotaxis indicates fleet is already in 4-figure scale; software fix + existing momentum suggests 10K target is achievable within 8 months.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will China release a major sovereign AI infrastructure/quantum-resistant blockchain standard by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Chinese government announcements (CNIS, MIIT), blockchain industry forums, Algorand/Hive partnership press releases
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: FLAG: 36Kr reports 'Hive shares jump 10% on $220M Canada sovereign AI infrastructure deal' + Algorand 'unveils roadmap to achieve quantum resistance by 2028'; Chinese competitive response is nearly certain but unpriced in Western prediction markets.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr exclusive on Hive/sovereign infrastructure + Algorand quantum roadmap signals geopolitical race in AI/crypto infrastructure; China will not cede this.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Tesla stock (TSLA) trade above $250 at any point before August 15, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: NASDAQ official closing price data, CNBC market data
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Hegseth's NATO criticism (BBC) and U.S. defense posture shift may benefit Tesla's defense/critical infrastructure contracts; Trump administration cuts to student loans signal fiscal pressure, but defense spending is exempt.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BBC 'Hegseth renews Nato criticism and says US will review presence in Europe' suggests defense reallocation; Tesla energy/grid business is underfunded by markets.

investment_theses.thesis: De-dollarization pressure from Iran deal and geopolitical realignment will support gold and Bitcoin as hedge assets; rotate into BTC/gold long positions.
supporting_signals: CNBC 'U.S. Navy ends blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas' + BBC 'Iran's supreme leader says Trump made deal out of desperation' signal fragile truce and long-term regime distrust.
Hegseth NATO criticism suggests U.S. is retreating from traditional alliance structure; non-aligned nations will diversify FX reserves away from USD.
36Kr sovereign AI infrastructure deal signals China accelerating alt-financial infrastructure (digital yuan, CIPS expansion).
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump administration is simultaneously hawkish on trade and inflation (Warsh Fed), which could strengthen USD and keep real rates elevated; safe-haven bid may favor USD over alternatives.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC/USD and long GLD (SPDR Gold Shares); also consider USDC yield curve flattening (implies real rate compression).

investment_theses.thesis: Fed's Warsh hawkishness is being overpriced by markets; actual rate path will remain higher for longer, creating a 'growth recession' that reprices mega-cap AI stocks lower and boosts dividend/value equities.
supporting_signals: CNBC headline: 'Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected'—this is the crowded trade.
Cointelegraph 'Bitcoin decouples from tech stocks' suggests capital is already rotating out of high-growth names into commodities/crypto.
Trump admin cutting student loan interest rates is fiscal stimulus, offsetting Fed tightness; market is not pricing this offset correctly.
investment_theses.counter_view: Warsh may be signaling to markets to preempt inflation expectations; actual cuts could come faster than priced if CPI rolls over in Q3.
investment_theses.expression: Short NVDA or short QQQ; long SPY with overweight to financials (XLF) and energy (XLE); or short the QQQ/SPY ratio via pair trade.

investment_theses.thesis: Stablecoin regulatory clarity (GENIUS Act) will unlock institutional adoption and corporate treasury reserve flows; USDC and stablecoin issuers will see margin expansion.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk 'U.S. agencies seek stablecoin customer-ID rules akin to banks in new GENIUS Act pitch'—regulatory alignment is rare.
Cointelegraph 'US regulators push user ID requirements for stablecoin issuers'—multiple agencies on same page.
Custodia/Vantage proposal for bank-deposit-linked stablecoins shows institutional demand is building (not yet priced).
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory framework could impose operational costs that compress margins; CBDC competition from Federal Reserve could displace private stablecoins.
investment_theses.expression: Long USDC yield via Compound/Aave (borrow USD-equivalent, lend USDC); also long Polymarket/Kalshi volume (volatility bet on regulatory votes).

investment_theses.thesis: Chinese AI and robotics (autonomous vehicles, embodied AI) are capturing venture and strategic capital faster than Western competitors; rotate exposure toward Chinese tech indices and underpriced AI infrastructure plays.
supporting_signals: FLAG: 36Kr exclusive reporting on Noematrix (embodied AI) raising 'several hundred million yuan' with backing from Shanghai's AI Future Fund suggests state-level commitment.
FLAG: 36Kr 'Hive shares jump 10% on $220M Canada sovereign AI infrastructure deal' suggests Canada is hedging geopolitical risk by partnering with Chinese AI firms.
36Kr 'Didi autonomous driving at MOVE 2026' shows Chinese firms are achieving real-world deployment speed vs. Western counterparts.
蔚来 (NIO) pushing world model across multiple hardware generations indicates software/AI moat is widening.
investment_theses.counter_view: Chinese tech stocks face U.S. sanctions risk (chip export controls, delisting); geopolitical fragmentation may isolate Chinese tech from Western markets.
investment_theses.expression: Long Chinese EV/AI indices (e.g., Alibaba BABA, or Hong Kong-listed Nio/XPeng); also long Canadian uranium/infrastructure plays (HEO.TO, UEC) as hedges within the 'allied supply chain' thesis.

investment_theses.thesis: Waymo's 3,900-unit recall, while negative headline, signals they are at genuine scale with rapid iteration; competitive advantage vs. Tesla Full Self-Driving (FSD) will grow; long Waymo parent (Alphabet/GOOGL) exposure.
supporting_signals: CNBC 'Waymo recalls about 3,900 robotaxis after some drove into freeway construction zones'—recall itself is a sign of maturity, not failure.
Scale of 3,900 units in single recall suggests total fleet is likely 8K–15K; Tesla FSD is not yet approved for unsupervised operation at this scale.
Alphabet earnings guidance will likely reflect Waymo as a discrete profit center by Q4 2026; market is underpricing this within GOOGL stock.
investment_theses.counter_view: Tesla could leapfrog Waymo via FSD; regulatory approval for unsupervised robotaxi service remains uncertain and could be delayed.
investment_theses.expression: Long GOOGL via call spread or overweight GOOGL within TQQQ/NASDAQ exposure; avoid short Waymo or Alphabet.
